Title: Create responsive app shell
User Story: As a platform user, I want a responsive app shell so that all portals share a consistent structure.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Responsive layout works on phone, tablet, laptop; route structure exists; light/dark support foundation exists.

Title: User can log in securely
User Story: As an account user, I want to log in securely so that I can access my authorized workspace.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Valid users can login; inactive users blocked; sessions managed.

Title: Admin manages role assignments
User Story: As Diginoces admin, I want to assign users to global, project, and event roles so that access is controlled.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Role permissions enforced by backend; unauthorized users denied.

Title: Sensitive users use 2FA
User Story: As Diginoces admin, I want sensitive roles to require 2FA so that critical functions are protected.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Sensitive-role login requires second factor; non-sensitive roles optional.

Title: Admin creates wedding project
User Story: As Diginoces admin, I want to create a wedding project so that I can manage a couple's service.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Project created with status; can contain events; permissions applied.

Title: Admin creates multiple events
User Story: As Diginoces admin, I want to create multiple events inside a project so that civil, religious, reception, and other celebrations are separated.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Project supports more than one event; event data stored separately.

Title: System generates project and event codes
User Story: As staff, I want readable project and event codes so that invitation IDs and reports are easy to identify.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Project code unique; event code auto-generated and editable by admin.

Title: Create master guest record
User Story: As staff, I want every guest stored once in the master database so that duplicates and event assignments are controlled.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Guest exists once at project level; can be assigned to events.

Title: Bride adds guest to her list
User Story: As a bride, I want to add guests to my bride-side list so that I can prepare my invited guests.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Bride can add own guest while unlocked; groom views but cannot edit; audit logged.

Title: Groom adds guest to his list
User Story: As a groom, I want to add guests to my groom-side list so that I can prepare my invited guests.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Groom can add own guest while unlocked; bride views but cannot edit; audit logged.

Title: Bride/groom imports guests
User Story: As bride/groom, I want to import CSV or Excel guests so that I can upload lists quickly.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Import preview appears; rows validated; submitted rows remain pending approval.

Title: Admin approves imported guests
User Story: As Diginoces admin, I want to approve imported guests before they become active so that bad data is controlled.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Admin can approve/reject/partially approve import; audit logged.

Title: Couple submits change request after lock
User Story: As bride/groom, I want to submit structured guest change requests after lock so that updates remain controlled.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: After lock direct edit blocked; change request created and tracked.

Title: Guest opens secure public page
User Story: As a guest, I want to open my public page without an account so that I can see my invitation information.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Only valid token opens own page; invalid token denied; no other guests visible.

Title: Guest page locked before payment
User Story: As Diginoces admin, I want guest pages locked until payment is complete so that guest-facing access follows business rules.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Guest cannot access locked page; admin preview allowed; exception override unlocks.

Title: Guest submits RSVP per event
User Story: As a guest, I want to answer Yes, No, or Maybe for each event I am invited to.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: One flow shows invited events; RSVP saved per event.

Title: RSVP No excludes guest from operations
User Story: As staff, I want No RSVP guests excluded from expected attendance, seating, reminders, and check-in so that operations are accurate.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: No removes guest from active lists but remains in history.

Title: Staff uploads Canva PDF template
User Story: As Diginoces staff, I want to upload a Canva PDF template for an event so that it can be personalized.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: PDF stored; linked to event; status uploaded.

Title: Staff places dynamic fields visually
User Story: As Diginoces staff, I want to drag fields onto the template so that guest data appears correctly.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Fields saved with page, position, size, type.

Title: Generate preview samples
User Story: As Diginoces admin, I want preview samples before mass generation so that layout and QR can be approved.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Preview generated for sample names; full generation blocked until approval.

Title: Generate invitations by event
User Story: As Diginoces staff, I want to generate invitations by event so that production is controlled.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Only ready guests generated; statuses updated; errors listed.

Title: Admin manages message templates
User Story: As Diginoces admin, I want approved French/English templates so that messages are consistent.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Templates store variables and language variants.

Title: Staff uses guided manual WhatsApp sending
User Story: As Diginoces staff, I want prepared WhatsApp messages so that I can send and track invitations manually.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Prepared message opens; staff marks status; action logged.

Title: Staff creates event tables
User Story: As staff, I want to create tables for an event so that guests can be seated.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Tables tied to event; capacity stored.

Title: Assign guests to tables
User Story: As bride/groom or staff, I want to assign guests to tables so that seating is planned.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Assignments respect permissions and show unassigned guests.

Title: Assigned staff opens check-in mode
User Story: As check-in staff, I want to access check-in mode only for assigned events.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Assigned staff allowed; unassigned staff denied.

Title: Check in guest by QR or manual search
User Story: As check-in staff, I want QR and manual search so that I can welcome guests quickly.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: QR and manual search identify event guest; check-in logged.

Title: Record Couple partial arrival
User Story: As check-in staff, I want to mark 1/2 or 2/2 arrivals for Couple invitations.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: 1/2 and 2/2 statuses work; second arrival does not trigger duplicate welcome.

Title: Admin creates packages and add-ons
User Story: As Diginoces admin, I want to manage service packages and add-ons so that pricing is controlled.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Only admin can manage packages; USD all-inclusive.

Title: Groom approves contract in app
User Story: As the groom, I want to approve the contract with a checkbox so that the guest-list workspace opens.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Contract visible; checkbox required; approval logged; guest list unlocks.

Title: Admin records payment and unlocks sending
User Story: As Diginoces admin, I want to record full payment so that invitation sending and guest pages unlock.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Full payment unlocks guest pages and sending; partial does not.

Title: Store files in project library
User Story: As staff, I want a project file library so that contracts, templates, invitations, and reports are organized.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Files categorized and scoped to project.

Title: Create audit log for sensitive actions
User Story: As Diginoces admin, I want sensitive actions logged so that the system remains traceable.
Acceptance Criteria Summary: Audit logs created and read-only; visible only to authorized internal roles.
